description:
Returns aircraft within the boundaries of the given continent.

Supported continents:
* Americas
* Africa
* Asia
* Europe
* Oceania
* Antarctica


To filter by continent use pure text value from the list above.

Examples:
* `/api/aircraft/v2/geospatial/continent/Europe`
* `/api/aircraft/v2/geospatial/continent/Antarctica`

parameters.name: continent
parameters.description: Name of the continent from the list above. Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: Accept-Encoding
parameters.description: The encoding type the client will accept in the response. API call must use compression.

200.description: Response containing a collection of aircraft models.
